reviews.name: 엄****
reviews.content: 친구 강아지한테 선물하려고 기분 좋게 샀지만 주자마자 삑삑이 소리 안나서 그냥 인형이 되어버렸어요 ㅠ 10번정도는 소리가 나더니 그 이상은 소리가 나지 않아서  불량인가 싶었습니다ㅜ ... 슬프네요 그치만 펭귄모양은 정말 귀여워요..친구 강아지 소형견이여서 장난감 크기는 좋았어요 너무 크지 않고 사이즈는 좋습니다 다만 소리가 안나요 ㅠ
reviews.content_en: I bought it excitedly to give as a gift to my friend's dog, but the squeaker didn't work right away and it just became a regular plush toy ㅠ It squeaked about 10 times and then stopped, so I thought it was defective ㅜ... It's sad, but the penguin shape is really cute.. Since my friend's dog is a small breed, the toy size was good. It's not too big and the size is perfect. It's just that the squeaker doesn't work ㅠ

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
작고 귀여워요! 근데 삑삑이 상태가 별로 좋지가 않아요ㅜㅜ
그거빼곤 재질도 좋고 한입에 잘 물고놀기 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: It's small and cute! But the squeaker isn't in great condition ㅜㅜ Other than that, the material is nice and it's great for biting and playing with!

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content: 꺄~인형 넘 기여워여~ㅎㅎ작아서 애기가 갖고 놀기 넘 좋아여~또 구매하려구여^^
reviews.content_en: Aww~The plush is so cute~ㅎㅎ It's small so the pup loves playing with it~I'm planning to buy it again^^

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content:
우앙~인형 넘 기여워영~ㅎㅎ작아서 애기가 갖고 놀기도 넘
좋아여^^
reviews.content_en: Aww~The plush is so cute~ㅎㅎ It's small so the pup loves playing with it too^^

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 배송 빨라요^^ 강아지가 너무 잘 갖고 놀아요. 삑삑이 안에 내장되어 있는 장난감 좋아하는데~ 좋아하네요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Shipping is fast^^ My dog loves it so much. The toy with the squeaker inside is great~He really loves it ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 배송 빨라요^^ 강아지가 너무 잘 갖고 놀아요. 삑삑이 안에 내장되어 있는 장난감 좋아하는데~ 좋아하네요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Shipping is fast^^ My dog loves it so much. The toy with the squeaker inside is great~He really loves it ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 배송 빨라요^^ 강아지가 너무 잘 갖고 놀아요. 삑삑이 안에 내장되어 있는 장난감 좋아하는데~ 좋아하네요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Shipping is fast^^ My dog loves it so much. The toy with the squeaker inside is great~He really loves it ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 구여워서 시리즈 별로 다 사고 싶당
reviews.content_en: It's so cute I want to buy the whole series

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 작아서 갖고놀기 더 좋은거같아요 귀엽고 뽁뽁소리도 잘나요
reviews.content_en: It's small so it's even better for playing with. It's cute and the crinkle sound comes out really well too

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 귀여워요. 삑삑이가 작아서 잘 가지고 놀 것같아요
reviews.content_en: It's cute. The squeaker is small so it should be easy for the pup to play with

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content: 인형도 넘 기엽구 애기가 넘 잘 갖고 놀아서 자주 구매하고 있어요~ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The plush is super cute and the pup plays with it so well that I keep buying it~ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 귀엽고 강쥐가 아주 좋아해여😘
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and my pup absolutely loves it😘

reviews.name: 류****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워서 제가 맘에 들어서 구매했어요 아직 설날 개봉예정이라 반응은 모르지만 너무 귀여움
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable that I bought it for myself. It's still unopened for New Year's so I don't know the reaction yet, but it's so cute

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 다른 거 구매하면서 같이 구매했는데 생각보다 엄청 작네요. 너무 작아서 조금 당황했어요. 그래도 아이가 좋아하고 잘 가지고 놀고 있습니다. 너무 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: I bought it together with something else and it's way smaller than I expected. I was a bit shocked at how small it is. Still, my pup loves it and plays with it well. It's so cute

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content:
울 멍뭉이는 바잇미 토끼인형이 최애인형이에요
다른건 잘 안가지고 노는데 이것만 가지고 놀아여!!!
심지어 바잇미에서 똑같은 제품 여러번 사는 경우는 처음이에여
대신 삑삑이 리필할 수 있는 부분이 있으면 좋을거 같아여!!!
reviews.content_en: My Mengmung's favorite toy is the BITE ME rabbit plush. She doesn't really play with other toys, but she only plays with this one!!! It's actually the first time I've bought the same product from BITE ME multiple times. It would be nice if there was a replaceable squeaker part though!!!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 봉봉그린 인형 좋아해서 할인할 때 사줬는데 역시 엄청 좋아하네요. 하루만에 다리가 다 쥐어뜯겼습니다😅
reviews.content_en: My pup loves the BongBong Green plush so I got it on sale and sure enough, she loves it. Both back legs were shredded in just one day😅

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
댕댕이가 좋아해요. 아주 잘 가지고 놀고있어요.
다만 강아지가 몇번 물으니 올이 금방 풀리는 재질이라 조금 아쉬워요.
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it. She plays with it all the time. The only downside is that the threads unravel pretty easily when the dog chews on it a few times, which is a bit disappointing.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
귀여워서 소장하고싶은 토끼네요
삑삑은 약한편이나 너무 시끄러운건 싫어서 맘에들어요
reviews.content_en: It's such a cute rabbit that I want to keep it. The squeaker is on the quieter side, but since I don't like things too loud, I'm happy with it

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 잘 가지고 놀아요~ 배송 빠르고 좋습니다! 삑삑이 좋아하는데 진짜 좋아하네용ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: She plays with it well~ Fast shipping and great! She really loves the squeaker ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 엄청 작아요… 귀엽긴하고…. 강아지 발바닥 보다 조금 크다?..
reviews.content_en: It's really tiny... It's cute though.... Slightly bigger than the dog's paw pad?...

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 봉제인형 사주면 하루이틀만에 귀떨어지거나 다리 떨어져서 솜터지는데 이거는 그렇지도 않고 애들이 너무 잘 가지고 놀고 쉽ㄱㅔ 터지지도않네요 !! 그래서 더 좋아요 (*Ü*)ﻌﻌﻌ♥
reviews.content_en: Usually when you buy stuffed toys they lose their ears or legs within a day or two and stuffing comes out, but this doesn't happen and the pups play with it so well and it doesn't tear easily!! That's why I like it even more (*Ü*)ﻌﻌﻌ♥

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 쪼그만 인형이라 입에 물고 다니기 좋아요! 털도 막 푸슬푸슬 퍼지는 털 아니라 털 뽑히는 일도 없어요. 다만 강아지가 엄청 좋아하진 않음 ㅠ.ㅠ
reviews.content_en: It's a tiny plush so it's good for carrying around in their mouth! The fur doesn't shed like those fluffy types either, so there's no fur loss. The only thing is that my dog doesn't love it that much ㅠ.ㅠ

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 작고 귀여워용 잘 쓸게용
reviews.content_en: It's small and cute~ I'll use it well~

reviews.name: 사****
reviews.content: 물고 있으면 너무 귀엽네요~ ^0^
reviews.content_en: It's so cute when they have it in their mouth~ ^0^

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 친구네 강아지 최애 장난감이래서 선물하려고 샀어요!
reviews.content_en: I heard it's my friend's dog's favorite toy so I bought it as a gift!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 역시나 신상은 좋아하네요^.^
reviews.content_en: New releases are always a hit^.^
